description: Phase 1–3: G01–G12 + corpusDocuments C001–C041. Phase 3: live corpus eval, aliasFileNames for renamed PDFs, C030-C041 new entries (non-life, mortgage, consumer credit, tax returns). Phase 1 golden: expectedOutputMode, expectedCoreFields, release gate.

phase3_acceptance.evalNote: Participant name extraction unreliable for scanned bundle PDF in eval environment (no Adobe preprocessing). Routing and type classification are verified via family/primary/publish checks.
Participant extraction returns minimal data for scanned MetLife proposal PDF in eval environment (no Adobe preprocessing). Multi-person routing is verified via family/primary/publish checks.
